channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: LPG, Defence Partnership Framework: Big Returns From PM's Short UAE Visit

media:content.media:description: The UAE is India's third-largest trade partner

item.description: Sources told NDTV that two important memorandums of understanding, in the areas of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) and Strategic Petroleum Reserves, are likely to be concluded during this visit.
item.content:encoded: Sources told NDTV that two important memorandums of understanding, in the areas of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) and Strategic Petroleum Reserves, are likely to be concluded during this visit.

item.title: Xi Gives Trump Rare Tour Of Secret Garden At Heart Of Chinese Government

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump talks with China's President Xi Jinping at the Zhongnanhai leadership compound in Beijing.

item.description: After talks on trade, Taiwan and Iran, Chinese President Xi Jinping showed off the centuriesold trees in Beijing’s walledoff Zhongnanhai compound, where he strolled with
item.content:encoded: After talks on trade, Taiwan and Iran, Chinese President Xi Jinping showed off the centuriesold trees in Beijing’s walledoff Zhongnanhai compound, where he strolled with

item.title: Watch: UAE's F-16 Jet Escorts PM Modi's Aircraft As He Arrives In Abu Dhabi

media:content.media:description: PM Modi is on a one-day visit to the UAE

item.description: PM Modi arrived in Abu Dhabi amid the global energy crisis due to the war in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi arrived in Abu Dhabi amid the global energy crisis due to the war in the Middle East.

item.title: 52% In UAE, 44% In US: How India's Rs 3 Fuel Hike Compares To Other Nations

media:content.media:description: Fuel Price Hike: India's annual crude import bill is already estimated at Rs 12-15 lakh crore.

item.description: Petrol, Diesel Price Today: Around 82 countries have imposed emergency restrictions, rationing, or sharp price hikes. India has done none of this.
item.content:encoded: Petrol, Diesel Price Today: Around 82 countries have imposed emergency restrictions, rationing, or sharp price hikes. India has done none of this.

item.title: Palestinian Family Alleges Land Taken Decades Ago Is Now Rented Out Online
item.description: Eko, a US-based advocacy group, identified 41 listings on the website across 14 Israeli settlements in the occupied West Bank, including areas around East Jerusalem and the Dead Sea.
item.content:encoded: Eko, a US-based advocacy group, identified 41 listings on the website across 14 Israeli settlements in the occupied West Bank, including areas around East Jerusalem and the Dead Sea.

item.title: Staffer Trampled, Reporters Blocked: Trump Aide Calls Xi Summit "S**t Show"

media:content.media:description: Dust-ups with the Chinese reportedly caused frustrations on the American side

item.description: A White House staff member was knocked down by members of the Chinese press pack where US President Donald Trump was holding a bilateral meeting with Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded: A White House staff member was knocked down by members of the Chinese press pack where US President Donald Trump was holding a bilateral meeting with Xi Jinping.

item.title: "F*** AI": Why Hollywood And Creative Artists Are Pushing Back

media:content.media:description: Oscar-winner Guillermo del Toro said "F*** AI" at Cannes, the audience erupted in applause

item.description: From Oscar-winning film director Guillermo del Toro's Cannes outburst to Indian musicians and actors rejecting AI-generated art, a growing section of the creative world is pushing back against Silicon Valley's AI rush.
item.content:encoded: From Oscar-winning film director Guillermo del Toro's Cannes outburst to Indian musicians and actors rejecting AI-generated art, a growing section of the creative world is pushing back against Silicon Valley's AI rush.

item.title: Trump China Visit LIVE Updates: Live: Trump Leaves China After High-Stake Summit Focused On Iran, Taiwan

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: Trump-Xi Have Made 'Fantastic Trade Deals, Great For Both Countries'

media:content.media:description: Trump had arrived in Beijing seeking to seal deals in sectors including agriculture, aviation and AI.

item.description: President Donald Trump said he had made "fantastic trade deals" with China's Xi Jinping, as the pair met on Friday at final talks of a superpower summit that according to the US leader has also reaped a Chinese...
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump said he had made "fantastic trade deals" with China's Xi Jinping, as the pair met on Friday at final talks of a superpower summit that according to the US leader has also reaped a Chinese...

item.title: '$100 Per Head': Inside 22-Year-Old Indian Man's Human Smuggling Ring In US

media:content.media:description: The accused paid his drivers for each individual they smuggled

item.description: According to court documents, Shivam's role was to arrange drivers to pick up "aliens" from the Canadian border and transport them further into the United States, specifically to stash houses around Northern New York and to hotels in Plattsburgh.
item.content:encoded: According to court documents, Shivam's role was to arrange drivers to pick up "aliens" from the Canadian border and transport them further into the United States, specifically to stash houses around Northern New York and to hotels in Plattsburgh.

item.title: Viral Puzzle Game 'Wordle' To Be Turned Into TV Show

media:content.media:description: "Wordle" gives players six chances to guess a random five-letter word

item.description: Savannah Guthrie will host the new NBC game show based on the viral word puzzle
item.content:encoded: Savannah Guthrie will host the new NBC game show based on the viral word puzzle

item.title: How Ukraine Is Replacing Snipers With Drones In War Against Russia

media:content.media:description: An official said that drones are "just more effective and cost less"

item.description: Drones have increasingly taken over the sniper’s roles of reconnaissance and targeted killing.
item.content:encoded: Drones have increasingly taken over the sniper’s roles of reconnaissance and targeted killing.

item.title: Oil Companies Losing Rs 1,600 Crore Daily. Will Rs 3 Petrol Hike Be Enough?
item.description: OMCs' production costs have "gone through the roof in the past month", Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri said last month after the governemnt cut central excise taxes to ease burdens.
item.content:encoded: OMCs' production costs have "gone through the roof in the past month", Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri said last month after the governemnt cut central excise taxes to ease burdens.

item.title: Trump Traded Hundreds Of Millions In US Securities In 2026

media:content.media:description: Trump's assets are held in a trust administered by his son, Donald Jr.

item.description: US President Donald Trump was involved in buying and selling securities linked to American companies in transactions that totaled hundreds of millions of dollars in the first quarter of 2026...
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump was involved in buying and selling securities linked to American companies in transactions that totaled hundreds of millions of dollars in the first quarter of 2026...

item.title: Scientists Dig Up Southeast Asia's 90-Foot Long Dinosaur In Thailand

media:content.media:description: Skeletal reconstruction of the Cretaceous Period sauropod dinosaur Nagatitan chaiyaphumensis.

item.description: Along a meandering river in a warm and arid region that is now Thailand roughly 113 million years ago, a planteating behemoth almost 90 feet (27 meters) long browsed
item.content:encoded: Along a meandering river in a warm and arid region that is now Thailand roughly 113 million years ago, a planteating behemoth almost 90 feet (27 meters) long browsed

item.title: Can PM Modi's UAE Visit Insulate India From Oil Shocks? What To Expect

media:content.media:description: PM's UAE Visit: This is the second face-to-face meeting between the two leaders in under five months.

item.description: PM Modi's 5-Nation Visit: It's expected that energy will dominate the conversation between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and UAE President.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi's 5-Nation Visit: It's expected that energy will dominate the conversation between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and UAE President.

item.title: Trump Explains Why He Agreed With Xi Jinping Calling US A "Declining Nation"

media:content.media:description: Trump claimed that two years ago, the US was, in fact, "a nation in decline".

item.description: In a long post on his Truth Social platform, Trump said Xi was "100 per cent correct" in his assessment that the United States was on a decline as the "country suffered immeasurably" due to the Biden administration's policies.
item.content:encoded: In a long post on his Truth Social platform, Trump said Xi was "100 per cent correct" in his assessment that the United States was on a decline as the "country suffered immeasurably" due to the Biden administration's policies.

item.title: Trump Wants Iran's Uranium For "Public Relations", Positive "Will Get It"

media:content.media:description: Trump said he will "feel better getting it (Iran's enriched uranium).

item.description: US President Donald Trump suggested that hunting down Iran's enriched uranium was primarily for political optics, after Israel demanded...
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump suggested that hunting down Iran's enriched uranium was primarily for political optics, after Israel demanded...

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Says Xi Offered Help To Open Hormuz, Vowed Not To Arm Iran
item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

item.title: NDTV Exclusive: A Catastrophe Captured By Satellites, Ignored By The World

media:content.media:description: In Sudan, it is a genocide you can see from space.

item.description: In Darfur, the violence that once mobilised international outrage in the early years of the civil war, has returned in a form many here insist never truly disappeared.
item.content:encoded: In Darfur, the violence that once mobilised international outrage in the early years of the civil war, has returned in a form many here insist never truly disappeared.
